title: galatella linosyris subsp. linosyris
intro: Galatella linosyris subsp. linosyris, also known as the autumn gentian or autumnal gentian, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Galatella linosyris subsp. linosyris include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
